description: Least-privilege capability set: SQL access + OS-shell URL open (no shell/process or fs scopes). Mitigates T-01-EOP. sql:default grants load/select/close; allow-execute is required for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE (seeding + writes). opener:default grants only URL-open (tel:/mailto:/http/https) to the OS default handler — NOT tauri-plugin-shell's broad process-spawn scope.
